mapper.select:
select o.* from nx_community_orders o left join nx_community_order_dispatch d on d.nx_cod_community_order_id = o.nx_community_orders_id and d.nx_cod_dispatch_status in ('ASSIGNED', 'LOADING', 'IN_DELIVERY', 'DELIVERED', 'EXCEPTION') where o.nx_CO_community_id = #{communityId} and ( o.nx_CO_service_type = 1 or (o.nx_CO_service_type is null and o.nx_CO_delivery_address_id is not null) ) and o.nx_CO_status >= 2 and o.nx_CO_status not in (5, 99) and o.nx_CO_delivery_address_id is not null and d.nx_community_order_dispatch_id is null
and (o.nx_CO_service_date is null or o.nx_CO_service_date = '' or o.nx_CO_service_date = #{routeDate})
order by o.nx_community_orders_id
mapper.insert: insert into nx_community_order_dispatch (nx_cod_community_order_id, nx_cod_community_id, nx_cod_dispatch_status, nx_cod_dispatch_stop_id, nx_cod_assigned_driver_user_id, nx_cod_route_date) values (#{nxCodCommunityOrderId}, #{nxCodCommunityId}, #{nxCodDispatchStatus}, #{nxCodDispatchStopId}, #{nxCodAssignedDriverUserId}, #{nxCodRouteDate})
mapper.update: update nx_community_order_dispatch set nx_cod_dispatch_status = 'UNASSIGNED', nx_cod_dispatch_stop_id = null, nx_cod_assigned_driver_user_id = null where nx_cod_dispatch_stop_id = #{value} and nx_cod_dispatch_status in ('ASSIGNED', 'LOADING')
